Incident response: Escalate suspected incidents to founder immediately
Privileged access: Limit production/admin access to founder-approved users
Deployment: Require PR review and green CI before merge
Tenant isolation: Run cross-tenant and RLS-enabled tests in CI
Infrastructure: Track hardening work in remediation register
Security testing: Run npm audit, gitleaks, Trivy, and CodeQL workflows
Require explicit founder acceptance for unresolved high-risk findings
Evidence: Keep public claims aligned to evidence
Mobile: Avoid stronger mobile-security claims until build evidence exists
Prioritize fail-closed production storage before observation
AI/privacy: Keep AI assistant disabled by default
Maintain AI transparency and subprocessor disclosures
